sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this fighting game

special_mechanics.name: Forward/Backward Dashing
special_mechanics.description: New ability to perform forward and backward dashing; 'Jet' in title refers to faster movement enabled by dash mechanics

special_mechanics.name: Attack Rebound
special_mechanics.description: When two attacks hit each other, they rebound

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Fighting game with arcade origins; Wikipedia source contains only gameplay mechanics descriptions and no quantified physics parameters. SNES port (1995) uses Game Boy version as basis with super-deformed graphics for handheld. No technical movement data documented.
